PSVAR_ASSESSMENT_DATA.description: Complete data structure required to assess PSVAR exemption eligibility for home-to-school transport services

company_name.description: Legal or trading name of the transport operator

operator_licence_number.description: PSV operator licence number issued by the Traffic Commissioner

authorised_contact_name.description: Name of the person authorized to make this application

authorised_contact_postal_address.description: Full postal address for correspondence and certificate delivery

service_types.description: Types of services operated: HTS (Home-to-School) or RR (Rail Replacement)

hts_closed_door.description: Whether home-to-school services are closed-door (pre-booked, not available to general public). If false, service is OUT OF SCOPE.

hts_has_paying_customers.description: Whether home-to-school services have paying customers. If false for HTS-only operators, service is OUT OF SCOPE.

rr_when_train_unavailable.description: Whether rail replacement services only operate when trains are unavailable (not used in HTS-only workflow)

total_hts_rr_fleet_size.description: Total number of vehicles used for home-to-school services. Determines compliance band: A (1-5), B (6-9), C (10-29), D (30+)

fully_compliant_vehicle_count.description: Number of vehicles that are fully PSVAR compliant (meet all accessibility requirements)

partially_compliant_vehicle_count.description: Number of vehicles that are partially compliant (meet some but not all requirements)

non_compliant_vehicle_count.description: Number of vehicles that are non-compliant (do not meet accessibility requirements)

temporarily_out_of_service_count.description: Number of vehicles temporarily out of service (not counted in compliance calculations)

vehicle_identification_numbers.description: VINs for all vehicles in the HTS fleet (17 characters each, ISO 3779 standard, excludes I, O, Q)

partially_compliant_vehicle_identificati.description: VINs specifically for partially compliant vehicles

exemption_certificate_exists.description: Whether the operator currently holds a valid PSVAR exemption certificate. If false and fleet non-compliant, operator needs to apply for exemption.

exemption_start_date.description: Start date of the exemption certificate in YYYY-MM-DD format. Required if exemption_certificate_exists is true.

exemption_end_date.description: End date of the exemption certificate in YYYY-MM-DD format. Required if exemption_certificate_exists is true. Exemption regime expires 2026-07-31.

exemption_certificate_reference.description: Unique reference number or identifier for the exemption certificate. Required if exemption_certificate_exists is true.

rail_commissioning_company_details.description: Details of rail commissioning company (not used in HTS-only workflow)

exemption_copy_carried_onboard.description: Whether a copy of the exemption certificate is carried onboard each relevant non-compliant vehicle. Must be true to maintain exemption validity. Only required if exemption exists.

alternative_accessible_transport_availab.description: Whether alternative accessible transport is available for passengers who cannot access exempt vehicles. Must be true to maintain exemption validity. Only required if exemption exists.

written_confirmation_retained.description: Whether written confirmation of alternative accessible transport arrangements is retained. Must be true to maintain exemption validity. Only required if exemption exists.

has_read_band_compliance_requirements.description: Whether the operator confirms they have read and understood their compliance band requirements. Must be true to maintain exemption validity. Only required if exemption exists.

fleet_size_changed.description: Whether the HTS fleet size has changed since the exemption was granted. If true and band changes, DfT must be notified within 5 working days. Only required if exemption exists.

dft_notified_within_5_days.description: Whether DfT was notified within 5 working days of a band-changing fleet size change. Must be true if fleet size changed and band changed. Only required if fleet_size_changed is true.

assessment_date.description: Date when the assessment is being performed in YYYY-MM-DD format. Determines which milestone requirements apply.

MILESTONE_REQUIREMENTS.description: Progressive compliance milestone requirements based on fleet band and assessment date

milestone_1.description: Aug 2023 to Jul 2024: 25% of fleet must be partially compliant

milestone_2.description: Aug 2024 to Jul 2025: 50% of fleet must be partially compliant

milestone_3.description: Aug 2025 onwards: 1 vehicle must be fully compliant, remaining vehicles must be at least partially compliant

milestone_1.description: Aug 2023 to Jul 2024: 25% of fleet must be partially compliant

milestone_2.description: Aug 2024 to Jul 2025: 1 vehicle must be fully compliant AND 50% of fleet must be partially compliant

milestone_3.description: Aug 2025 onwards: 2 vehicles must be fully compliant, remaining vehicles must be at least partially compliant

milestone_1.description: Aug 2023 to Jul 2024: 25% of fleet must be partially compliant

milestone_2.description: Aug 2024 to Jul 2025: 15% of fleet must be fully compliant AND 50% of fleet must be partially compliant

milestone_3.description: Aug 2025 onwards: 25% of fleet must be fully compliant, remaining vehicles must be at least partially compliant

Band_D.description: Requirements for fleets with 30 or more vehicles

milestone_1.description: Aug 2023 to Jul 2024: 15% of fleet must be fully compliant AND 25% of fleet must be partially compliant

milestone_2.description: Aug 2024 to Jul 2025: 25% of fleet must be fully compliant AND 50% of fleet must be partially compliant

milestone_3.description: Aug 2025 onwards: 35% of fleet must be fully compliant, remaining vehicles must be at least partially compliant

regime_expiry.description: The PSVAR exemption regime expires on 2026-07-31. Full PSVAR compliance is expected from 2026-08-01 onwards.

DECISION_OUTCOMES.description: Possible assessment outcomes and their meanings

OUT_OF_SCOPE.description: Service is not covered by this exemption guidance (e.g., not HTS, not closed-door, no paying customers)

EXEMPTION_NOT_NEEDED.description: All vehicles in the fleet are fully PSVAR compliant, no exemption required

POTENTIALLY_EXEMPT_IF_VALID_CERTIFICATE_.description: Fleet meets milestone requirements but needs a valid exemption certificate to rely on the exemption

NOT_EXEMPT.description: Fleet does not meet milestone requirements or has an expired/invalid certificate

EXEMPT_BUT_NON_COMPLIANT_WITH_CONDITIONS.description: Has valid exemption certificate but fails to meet operational conditions (e.g., no copy onboard, no alternative transport)

CAN_HAVE_EXEMPTION.description: Operator meets all requirements and can rely on the exemption

CANNOT_HAVE_EXEMPTION.description: Operator does not meet requirements and cannot rely on the exemption

FURTHER_INVESTIGATION_REQUIRED.description: Missing critical information or edge cases require manual DVSA review

EXEMPTION_NOT_REQUIRED.description: Fleet is fully compliant, no exemption needed
